Who I Am

About Me

👨‍💻
Vikas Relangi

Passionate about AI, Data & Building Real-World Solutions

I have a strong foundation in data analytics, machine learning, Python development, and SQL. I enjoy transforming complex datasets into meaningful insights and developing intelligent solutions that create real-world impact.

Through academic learning, internships in Cybersecurity and AWS Cloud, and industry certifications from IBM, Deloitte, GUVI × HCL and more, I've built hands-on experience across the full data science workflow — from raw data wrangling to deploying ML models as web applications.

Currently enrolled in the GUVI × HCL Master Data Science Program, I'm continuously expanding my expertise. My goal is to contribute to innovative, data-driven organizations where I can deliver value and grow professionally.

What I've Built

Projects

01

AI-Based Face Recognition Attendance System

Automated attendance management using deep learning and face recognition. Identifies individuals in real time and records attendance with high accuracy, reducing manual effort significantly.

PythonDeep LearningMongoDBFace Recognition
02

Secure Password Generator

Flask web app that generates strong, secure passwords with real-time strength validation using rule-based scoring logic and secure coding principles including hashing techniques.

PythonFlaskSecurity
03

AI-Based Movie Recommendation System

ML-powered recommendation engine that suggests movies based on user preferences and viewing patterns through collaborative filtering to enhance personalized experiences.

PythonMachine LearningCollaborative Filtering
04

Rule-Based Chatbot

Intelligent chatbot using Python and Flask that responds to predefined user queries, demonstrating natural language interaction and logical decision-making patterns.

PythonFlaskNLP
05

Tic-Tac-Toe Web Application

Interactive browser-based Tic-Tac-Toe game with a clean user interface and complete game logic, showcasing full-stack Python web development skills.

Professional Summary
Recent B.Tech graduate in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science with hands-on experience in data analysis, Python development, machine learning, and Flask-based web application development. Completed the IITM Pravartak Certified Advanced Programming & Master Data Science Program through GUVI × HCL. Proficient in Python, SQL, Pandas, NumPy, and ML frameworks including Regression, Decision Trees, and CNNs. Experienced in secure application development through a Cybersecurity internship (OWASP Top 10, AES encryption, secure SDLC). Seeking entry-level roles in Data Analytics, ML Engineering, Python Development, or Software Engineering.
